name: Jannat Se Aagay
overview: Tabassum, a struggling college student who becomes a nanny for her idol, celebrity host Jannat. As Tabassum's admiration fades and ethical boundaries blur, Jannat's own life unravels due to marital issues and career pressures. Both women face personal crises and ultimately find solace by reevaluating their relationships and priorities.

trailers.title: Jannat Se Aagay Episode 01 - [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 11th August 2023
Jannat Se Aagay | Launching On 11th Aug | Ft. Kubra Khan, Ramsha Khan, Gohar Rasheed, Talha Chahour
